sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh Kumpi suak a, van tokhom tung tu hi;
Kumpi lukhu kikhusak a, mi siangte’n pahtawi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I lung a kim ding hi, nung

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sim zawh loh mi honpi’n, puanpaak silh tee zihziah;
hiang tawi-in, phatna la sa ziahziah.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Amau ading sipa, Tuuno a phat uh
Tuuno’ sisan hang kilemna, lukhu khu ciat uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Gualzo mi siangte tawh van-ah, Nong kipawl khawmsak hi.
